name: @intentsolutionsio/sql-query-optimizer
description: Analyze and optimize SQL queries for better performance, suggesting indexes, query rewrites, and execution plan improvements

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install sql-query-optimizer\\n  or /plugin install sql-query-optimizer@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
